projects.title: Auction -Website
projects.description: A bidding marketplace where users can browse listings, create items, place bids, and track bidding history.

projects.title: E-commerce website
projects.description: A responsive storefront featuring product browsing, category filtering, a shopping cart, and a smooth checkout flow.

projects.title: Accommodation website
projects.description: A venue booking platform featuring availability display, host management, and a clear, user-friendly reservation flow.
